step_by_step_thinking: I agree that the correct representation for Modified Shock Index (MSI) is \( \text{HR} / \text{SBP} \). However, understanding that MSI helps assess hemodynamic stability by comparing heart rate to systemic vascular resistance through systolic blood pressure provides additional context supporting the use of this specific ratio over others like mean arterial pressure (MAP).
